accommodations.text: Provide a visual schedule for each class period.
accommodations.source_quote: visual schedule for each class period

accommodations.text: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: additional wait time for verbal responses

accommodations.text: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.
accommodations.source_quote: preferential seating near the point of instruction

accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work

accommodations.text: Provide sentence starters for oral presentations.
Provide 50% extended time on tests and long assignments.
accommodations.source_quote: 50% extended time on tests and long assignments

accommodations.text: Accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting.
accommodations.source_quote: accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on classroom assessments.
Allow scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes.
accommodations.source_quote: scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction executive functioning 50 minutes twice weekly
Specialized academic instruction 50 minutes twice weekly
Specialized academic instruction reading 30 minutes 5 times weekly

goals.text: Emma will request clarification when she misses information in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: request clarification when she misses information

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: accept a change in routine using a coping strategy

goals.text: Oscar will use a checklist to organize materials for each class in 8 of 10 days.
goals.source_quote: use a checklist to organize materials for each class

goals.text: Jamal will answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Ethan will arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days.
goals.baseline: Arrives with required materials in 3 of 10 class days.
goals.source_quote: arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days
